headlines.title: Five humanitarian workers killed in convoy ambush in South Sudan

headlines.title: Iran says final talks depend on implementation of US-Iran MoU clauses
headlines.snippet: Iran says final talks depend on implementation of US-Iran MoU clauses Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf says Tehran will not begin negotiations on a final agreement before key clauses of its memorandum of understanding with the United States are implemented.

headlines.title: Palestinian Authority warns against Israeli settlement plans in E1 area
headlines.snippet: Palestinian Authority warns against Israeli settlement plans in E1 area The Palestinian Authority's Cabinet has warned against Israeli preparations to issue a tender for the construction of more than 3,400 settlement units in the E1 area, according to the Government Media Office.

headlines.title: Israel's 'kill first' strategy is now aimed at Turkey. Will the region respond?
headlines.snippet: Israel's 'kill first' strategy is reportedly now being aimed at Turkey, raising questions about the region's response. The article discusses Israel's actions and their implications for redrawing the Middle East's borders.

headlines.title: Iran, Oman to jointly charge fees along Strait of Hormuz: Report
headlines.snippet: Iran and Oman are reportedly planning to jointly charge fees for passage through the Strait of Hormuz. This move appears to be an effort to prevent Iran from imposing a unilateral toll on the critical waterway.

headlines.snippet: The Syrian parliament is preparing to announce the selection of 70 Members of Parliament. Following this announcement, the new legislature will commence the process of debating and approving legislation.

headlines.title: Man arrested after arson attack on Dublin Islamic centre
headlines.snippet: A man has been arrested following an arson attack on an Islamic center in Dublin. The incident occurred after worshippers had finished their Duhur prayer at Dublin's Al Madinah Hall, and no injuries were reported.

headlines.title: US Supreme Court rejects Trump bid to end birthright citizenship
headlines.snippet: The US Supreme Court has rejected a bid by Trump to end birthright citizenship. Chief Justice John Roberts emphasized that children born in the United States are citizens at birth under the Fourteenth Amendment.

headlines.title: Iran prepares for late supreme leader's funeral later this week
headlines.snippet: Iran is preparing for the funeral of its late supreme leader, which is scheduled to take place later this week. Representatives from approximately 30 countries are expected to attend the ceremony.

headlines.title: Fresh Israeli strikes on Gaza set 200 tents ablaze despite truce
headlines.snippet: Fresh Israeli strikes on Gaza have set approximately 200 tents ablaze, despite a ceasefire. These strikes have destroyed tents and left thousands of people without shelter.
